highlights.title: Samsung, Labor Union to Meet in ‘Last Chance’ to Avert Strike
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co. and its largest labor union are set to resume negotiations Monday to avert a strike that the nation’s prime minister warned could wreak havoc on the economy.
